sessions.intent: Create coder handoff spec for terminology consistency fix: actions/ → modules/, IClass → IAction

before.assumptions: Web Claude doc has the right intent but may have stale interface signatures. Need to verify actual codebase state.
before.risk: Medium — wide rename across ~130 files, but purely mechanical. Namespace collision with existing IAction entity interface needs handling.

sessions.plan: Delete stale entity IAction, git mv actions/ → modules/, rename IClass → IAction, update Library internals (handler → action), update source generator namespace strings, update 25 test files

actions.context: Verified actual codebase state vs Web Claude doc. Found IAction naming collision — entity IAction is dead code, safe to delete first. Action entity already has correct Module/ActionName properties. No BaseClass exists. Handoff spec reflects real code.

after.health: Branch created, plan written. Ready for coder handoff.
after.notes: Mechanical rename task. ~130 files affected but pattern is simple find-and-replace. Main risk is the source generator namespace strings — those are string literals that must match exactly.

sessions.intent: Assess whether scaffolding is needed for terminology rename task

before.assumptions: Rename task may need type skeletons or failing tests

sessions.plan: No scaffolding needed. Pure mechanical rename with no new types or tests.

actions.context: Verified build is clean (0 errors). No new types or tests to scaffold. Handed off directly to coder.

after.health: Ready for coder. No scaffolding artifacts — coder works from architect plan directly.
after.notes: Flagged two risks for coder: GetCodeGenerated tuple rename (Handler → Action) is breaking at call sites, and HandlerError → ActionError affects test assertions.
